ddls:
CREATE TABLE "languages" (
  "language_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each language */,
  "language_name" TEXT /* Name of the language (e.g., Afrikaans, Albanian) */,
  "code" TEXT /* Code for the language (e.g., af, sq) */,
  "language_direction" TEXT /* Direction of the language (e.g., left-to-right, right-to-left) */,
  "language_type" TEXT /* Type of language (e.g., spoken, sign language) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("language_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "translations" (
  "translation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each translation */,
  "language_id" INTEGER /* ID of the language being translated */,
  "product_version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product version being translated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the translation (e.g., 303 082.58) */,
  "untranslated" INTEGER /* Number of untranslated strings */,
  "needs_review" INTEGER /* Number of strings that need review */,
  "translation_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the translation */,
  "translation_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the translation */,
  "translation_review_date" TEXT /* Review date of the translation */,
  "translated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the translator who performed the translation */,
  "reviewed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the reviewer who reviewed the translation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("translation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_translations_language_id FOREIGN KEY ("language_id") REFERENCES languages ("language_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_translations_reviewed_by FOREIGN KEY ("reviewed_by") REFERENCES reviewers ("reviewer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_translations_translated_by FOREIGN KEY ("translated_by") REFERENCES translators ("translator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_translations_product_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_version_id") REFERENCES product_versions ("product_version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_versions" (
  "product_version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product version */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the product */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the product version */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "product_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "translators" (
  "translator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each translator */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the translator */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the translator */,
  "language_id" INTEGER /* ID of the language the translator is working on */,
  "translator_experience" INTEGER /* Experience of the translator in years */,
  "translator_specialization" TEXT /* Specialization of the translator (e.g., technical, medical) */,
  "translator_rate" TEXT /* Hourly rate of the translator */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("translator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_translators_language_id FOREIGN KEY ("language_id") REFERENCES languages ("language_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviewers" (
  "reviewer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each reviewer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the reviewer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the reviewer */,
  "language_id" INTEGER /* ID of the language the reviewer is working on */,
  "reviewer_experience" INTEGER /* Experience of the reviewer in years */,
  "reviewer_specialization" TEXT /* Specialization of the reviewer (e.g., technical, medical) */,
  "reviewer_rate" TEXT /* Hourly rate of the reviewer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("reviewer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviewers_language_id FOREIGN KEY ("language_id") REFERENCES languages ("language_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "translation_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each change */,
  "translation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the translation being changed */,
  "changed_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the change */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date the change was made */,
  "change_type" TEXT /* Type of change (e.g., update, delete) */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_translation_history_translation_id FOREIGN KEY ("translation_id") REFERENCES translations ("translation_id")
)
